_comment: Brand Kit Geo Carpentry LLC. Sprint F1 (Jorge 2026-05-08). Replicado del schema Pinnacle. Validacion multi-tenant: si funciona aqui, schema esta listo para FC, Nica, T4, Essenthia.

messaging.tagline_long: Custom Carpentry, Remodeling, and Construction in Northeast Wisconsin. Bilingual, Licensed, 500+ Projects Strong.
messaging.mission: Deliver craftsmanship that lasts decades — custom carpentry, kitchen and bath remodeling, deck building, and full home renovations across Northeast Wisconsin, with bilingual service and transparent pricing.
messaging.vision: Be the contractor Wisconsin homeowners trust for life — the team that families call back for every project, every time.
messaging.elevator_pitch: We're Geo Carpentry — 10+ years, 500+ projects, 100-mile radius from Green Bay. Custom carpentry, kitchens, baths, decks, and full renovations. Bilingual, licensed, and locally owned.
messaging._GAP_messaging: Tagline + mission + vision drafted by ALEX based on memory facts — Jorge to approve or refine wording

voice.tone: skilled craftsman who explains the work simply, takes pride in details, treats homeowners as partners
voice.personality: experienced foreman who's proud of his crew, his quality, and his Wisconsin roots
voice.reading_level: 8th grade (homeowners need clarity on scope + pricing)

do: Show before/after when possible — visual proof of craftsmanship
Quote precisely (line-item by material + labor) — no surprises
Acknowledge customer concerns (budget, timeline, mess) before pitching
Cite Wisconsin context (winter timing, cedar vs PT, permit lead times)
Speak to the homeowner directly, in second person
dont: Pressure tactics, fake urgency, unrealistic timelines
Pretend to be a national chain or franchise
Promise specific delivery dates we can't guarantee with weather/permits

voice.language_note: Spanish content for hispanic homeowners + crew communication. WhatsApp primary channel for ES.

primary.name: TBD
primary._GAP: Brand primary color — Jorge to confirm. Suggestion: a warm wood-tone or deep forest green (matches construction/carpentry industry)

colors._aesthetic: Solid + craftsman + warmth. NO trendy/tech. Audience: WI homeowners considering renovation — they want trust + skill, not flash. Construction industry default: woods, earth tones, dark green or navy.

secondary_font._GAP: Optional editorial font for testimonials/long-form. Default fallback to Inter if not set.

usage_rules.default_position: top-left with drop-shadow on photo backgrounds

social_media._decision: FB primary platform. IG to be set up. LinkedIn opcional (B2B contractor-architect partnerships).

compliance.fair_housing_disclaimer: Geo Carpentry LLC complies with Federal Fair Housing Act. We provide construction services without regard to race, color, religion, sex, handicap, familial status, or national origin.
compliance.contractor_disclosure: Geo Carpentry LLC is a licensed Wisconsin general contractor providing carpentry, remodeling, and construction services within 100 miles of Green Bay, WI.
compliance.insurance_disclosure: Fully insured for liability and worker's compensation
compliance._GAP: Wisconsin contractor license number — Jorge to provide for compliance + transparency

specialties: Wisconsin winter-resilient deck construction (cedar, PT, composite)
services._note: 6 servicios oficiales confirmed in memoria. Specialties drafted by ALEX — Jorge to approve.

vs_solo_contractors: Office at 735 E Walnut St Green Bay (real business, not truck-and-toolbox)
